flash.page.title: Flash Center
flash.page.subtitle: Select product and L4T version, then flash firmware
flash.device.title: Target Device
flash.device.subtitle: Select product model and matching L4T version
flash.docs.getting_started_tip: Open the Getting Started Wiki for this product
flash.docs.hardware_tip: Open the Hardware Interface Wiki for this product
flash.options.title: Execution Options
flash.recovery.title: Recovery Mode Guide
flash.guide.title: Client Getting Started
flash.guide.subtitle: After flashing, continue from these sections.
flash.guide.next_desc: Restart device, complete user/network/basic setup, then continue with device management or remote development.
flash.guide.step.devices.title: Devices
flash.guide.step.devices.desc: Check Jetson status, run diagnostics, and troubleshoot peripherals.
flash.guide.step.apps.title: Apps
flash.guide.step.apps.desc: Install common AI apps, runtime environments, and dev tools.
flash.guide.step.skills.title: Skills
flash.guide.step.skills.desc: Use built-in skills to quickly deploy, repair, and configure tasks.
flash.guide.step.remote.title: Remote
flash.guide.step.remote.desc: Set up SSH and continue operating from your PC.
flash.guide.step.community.title: Community
flash.guide.step.community.desc: Read docs, forum discussions, and FAQs.
flash.step1.title: Step 1: Prepare Firmware
flash.step1.subtitle: Download and extract BSP locally, or use cache to continue.
flash.step2.title: Step 2: Enter Recovery Mode
flash.step2.subtitle: Connect device via USB, hold Recovery while powering on (or press Reset), then click Detect Device to confirm Recovery mode.
flash.step3.title: Step 3: Flashing
flash.step4.title: Step 4: Done
flash.btn.download_extract_tip: Skip download if archive exists; ask before overwrite if extracted directory exists.
flash.btn.clear_cache_tip: Select archive and/or extracted directory to remove.
flash.btn.next_tip: If extracted directory is ready, continue to flash step.
flash.log.title: Log
flash.recovery.no_guide: No Recovery guide available for this device
flash.image.zoom_hint: Use mouse wheel to zoom; drag with left mouse button to inspect details.
flash.detect.status_found: Jetson recovery device detected. Ready to flash.
flash.detect.status_not_found: No recovery device detected. Check cable and recovery mode.
flash.detect.warn_no_apx: [WARN] lsusb did not find a matching NVIDIA APX device
flash.log.retry_requested: [INFO] User requested retry. Restarting flash for current device and version.
flash.product_summary.docs_shortcut: Docs shortcut: use the buttons below
flash.cache.extracted_ready: Downloaded and extracted. Ready to flash (download skipped).
flash.cache.archive_ready: Archive cached ({size_mb:.0f} MB). It will be extracted automatically during flashing.
flash.cache.no_local: No local cache. Click "Download / Extract BSP" first.
flash.dialog.clear_cache.title: Clear Cache
flash.dialog.clear_cache.details: You can clear only archive files or only extracted workspace.
flash.dialog.sudo.title: Administrator Permission Required
flash.dialog.sudo.desc: Extracting and flashing firmware requires sudo permission.
flash.dialog.extracted_exists.title: Extracted Directory Exists
flash.dialog.extracted_exists.text: Detected an existing extracted firmware directory. Redownload and overwrite?
flash.dialog.extracted_exists.info: Choose Skip to use current directory and continue.
flash.log.sudo_denied_operation: [WARN] sudo permission not granted, operation canceled
flash.log.use_existing_extracted: [INFO] Using existing extracted directory, skipping download and extract
flash.log.archive_exists_skip_download: [INFO] Archive already exists, skip download and extract directly
